name: @quoin/tokens-uswds
description: United States Web Design System tokens translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: USWDS is a work of the U.S. Federal Government and is in the public domain. Token values reflect the USWDS v3 'standard' palette (cool-blue primary + neutral gray). Source Sans Pro is referenced by family name only — no font files are redistributed.
